Here is a sample PlantUML diagram with the following description:
```
label "Name": "Tomato",
expression "tomato"
expression "1"  // Tomato quantity
expression "2"
expression "3" // Tomato quantity, tomato quantity to be calculated (using the `@startuml` tag)
expression "4"
```
